headline: Truist Securities Maintains Hold on Extra Space Storage, Raises Price Target to $148
summary: Truist Securities  analyst Michael Lewis   maintains Extra Space Storage (NYSE:EXR) with a Hold and raises the price target from $140 to $148.

headline: REITs: Cheap, Unloved, And Finally Showing Life
summary: REITs in 2026 are defying rising yields as fundamentals, M&A, NOI growth, and dividend hikes drive returns.
